lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Mechanical components require major repairs and are not fully functional.
Fair condition.

Looking for a dependable ride that won't break the bank? This vehicle is a solid, honest daily driver that’s ready for many more miles! While it shows some expected signs of use and cosmetic wear from its time on the road, it remains a functional and reliable choice for anyone seeking value. It’s been well-loved and is priced to sell, making it a great opportunity to get behind the wheel of a quality car at a fair price!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly indistinguishable from a brand-new model. The exterior paint retains its original factory luster with a flawless, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections—no rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, and the interior still has that new-car scent. Every electronic feature, from the advanced navigation system to the premium sound system, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is sound, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history. It drives smoothly and powerfully, exactly as it did the day it was first sold. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer seeking a showroom-quality vehicle.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has noticeable scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear on the upholstery and carpet. All mechanical components are currently operational, though some maintenance may be required in the near future.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine runs roughly and the transmission shows signs of slipping, meaning it is not currently reliable for daily transportation. Externally, the body has visible rust, multiple dents, and significant paint fading, while the interior shows heavy wear with several tears in the upholstery and a cracked dashboard. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited as a project for a mechanic or for its salvageable parts.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and value. Our rigorous inspection process ensures that this selection meets the high standards expected of our inventory, providing a reliable and sophisticated driving experience.

Hey there! 👋 I'm selling my reliable daily driver, and it's honestly been such a dream to own. It’s in really solid shape, super dependable, and has plenty of life left for its next owner! You’re going to love how it feels on the road. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a purist's dream, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The 6-speed manual gearbox offers crisp, short-throw shifts, sending power to the rear wheels through a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been enhanced with poly-bushes and a subframe reinforcement kit to handle the lateral Gs this platform is famous for. Recent service includes a valve adjustment and cooling system refresh, ensuring the powertrain remains robust. It’s a mechanically sorted example that balances
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a fantastic balance of luxury and performance. The exterior finish retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor signs of road use expected for its age. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any significant wear, while the dashboard and infotainment systems function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car has been treated with the utmost care, boasting a complete service history and a smooth, responsive driving experience. It sits on a set of high-quality tires with plenty of tread remaining. Whether you're commuting in style or heading out on a weekend getaway, this reliable and attractive machine is ready for its next chapter.

This vehicle presents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and proven reliability. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent mechanical integrity, this unit exemplifies the rigorous standards of our curated inventory. It remains a robust and high-performing selection, fully prepared for immediate delivery and long-term service.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a sophisticated synthesis of performance and reliability. Every system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and comfort, ensuring a superior driving experience.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out on a weekend road trip, this car is ready for its next adventure with you. It runs smoothly and looks great—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Up for sale is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine with high-pressure VANOS and individual throttle bodies. This unit delivers linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline, paired with a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis remains taut with a factory-spec limited-slip differential and essential subframe reinforcement already addressed. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a valve adjustment, ensuring the high-strung valvetrain operates within tight tolerances. While showing
Reliable daily driver. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Minor exterior wear.

This well-maintained executive sedan offers a perfect blend of performance and luxury. The exterior retains a deep metallic shine, showing only minor cosmetic wear expected from responsible ownership. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and clean, featuring heated seating, a power sunroof, and an intuitive infotainment suite. Mechanically sound, the turbocharged engine provides smooth, responsive power, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent multi-point inspection. Garage-kept and smoke-free, this vehicle features excellent tire tread and a quiet, comfortable cabin. It represents a reliable opportunity for a buyer seeking a high-quality, sophisticated driving experience that has been cared for with attention to detail.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. Rigorously inspected to meet our professional standards, this automobile offers exceptional value for those seeking a balance of performance and prestige.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a refined interior and a robust powertrain that ensures a superior driving experience. Every aspect of this automobile has been thoroughly vetted to meet our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It remains a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable and sophisticated automotive solution.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really nice shape and has been well-maintained, so it's totally ready to hit the road with its next owner! If you're looking for something reliable that still looks great and drives smoothly, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

This 996.2-generation Carrera features the robust 3.6L M96 flat-six engine, utilizing VarioCam Plus for an optimized torque curve and 320 hp. Power is delivered through a G96 six-speed manual transaxle, ensuring tactile gear engagement and mechanical synergy. The chassis retains its factory-spec handling characteristics with a multi-link rear suspension and MacPherson struts, providing excellent lateral grip and communicative steering feedback. Braking is handled by four-piston monoblock calipers over vented rotors for consistent thermal management. This example has been maintained with an IMS bearing retrofit and a new rear main seal, addressing critical preventative maintenance. The paint and interior show honest wear consistent with a well-loved driver’s car, but the powertrain remains tight and responsive.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable engine. Ready for pickup.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the alloy wheels are free of major scuffs. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free, pristine cabin featuring supple leather seating and an array of fully operational tech, including a premium sound system and responsive climate control. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced regularly with a documented history of oil changes and a recent brake service. It handles beautifully on the highway and provides a smooth, quiet ride, making it an ideal choice for someone seeking a reliable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term reliability. Available is a meticulously maintained E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced VANOS system to ensure peak variable valve timing performance. This chassis has undergone critical rear subframe reinforcement, addressing the platform's primary structural weak point. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential, providing exceptional mechanical grip. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing updated bushings and refreshed dampers to maintain its legendary communicative handling. While the aesthetics show minor signs of use consistent with an enthusiast-driven vehicle, the mechanical vitals—including valve clearances and rod bearing tolerances—are within optimal specifications, making this a turn-key driver's car with high-performance pedigree.
Reliable vehicle. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Title in hand.
